items.name_en: Top-tier Original Sample, Version with Chip Change
items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original Sample, Version with Chip Change
M25352 Black M25354 Brown 25353 Yellow
Low Key Hobo Small Handbag features smooth calfskin paired with suede leather lining, accommodating a short wallet, large smartphone, keys, and other small items. The shoulder strap is adjustable via a lock-and-buckle closure, and a detachable Monogram canvas zippered interior pocket ensures neat storage. 24.0 x 28.0 x 16.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original, Code-chip change
M46041 Large Grey Print, M45976 Large Black
M45979 Large Black Print
This Madeleine Medium Bag is crafted from Monogram Empreinte calfskin, featuring a large Monogram pattern through embossing and printing. The classic S-lock and leather key pouch highlight the brand's heritage, while ample space, a close-to-body silhouette, and multiple carrying options make it a great choice for business or leisure.
Dimensions: 30.0 x 19.5 x 11.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original, Code-chip change
M46041 Small Grey Print
This Madeleine BB Bag is crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, paired with a classic S-lock and leather key pouch. The handle design allows for hand or elbow carrying, while a detachable shoulder strap enables shoulder and crossbody options. The compact silhouette accommodates essentials like a wallet, keys, and phone.
Dimensions: 24.0 x 17.0 x 8.5 cm (L x H x W)

M47096 Monogram, M47162 Yellow Flower

Locks and key pouch highlight classic details, while the leather woven chain and shoulder strap are detachable for versatile carrying options.

items.name_cn:
High Version
【New Coconut Tree Light Blue❤ Medium】
Dior book tote shopping bag
Inspired by the creative director of women's wear, Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote bag is a flagship product that embodies Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily essentials, featuring a brand-new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with the D-Stripes pattern embroidery, exuding a more stylish look. The front is adorned with the 'Christian Dior' logo, fully demonstrating Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm
